title: hypenanthe bracteatum
intro: Hypenanthe bracteatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly known as the 'Himalayan Angelica'. It is a perennial plant native to the Himalayan region, known for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Hypenanthe bracteatum can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used as a spice in local cuisine.
